items.name: is_dark_mode
items.signature: pub(crate) fn is_dark_mode() -> bool { false }  /// Apply OS-level backdrop to a Slint window. /// No-op when `style == BgStyle::Solid` or on non-Windows platforms. pub fn apply_backdrop(window: &slint::Window, style: BgStyle)
items.doc: Fallback dark-mode check for non-Windows platforms (always returns false).

items.name: apply_backdrop
items.doc:
Apply OS-level backdrop to a Slint window.
No-op when `style == BgStyle::Solid` or on non-Windows platforms.
